headings: (c) All of that property located at 789 Some Street, Bryan, TX 77801
text: - (b) The Contractor shall have the right to terminate this Subcontract at any time for the Contractor's convenience and without cause, upon giving the Subcontractor three (3) days' notice in writing. In the event of termination in accordance with this paragraph (b), the Contractor shall pay the Subcontractor, pursuant to the terms of the THIRTEENTH clause, all amounts to which the Subcontractor may be entitled on account of the Subcontract Work performed.
